titleStmt.title: Stela of Prasat Ta Krabei (K. 1319), 10th century CE

licence.p: This work is licenced under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

handDesc.p: The lettering is characteristic of the tenth century CE.

projectDesc.p: The project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_IdListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.p:
Face A
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - varddha
gi ta _ svāmī ta jmaḥ steñ app ta [kvan cloñ] - - - - ti
- - - yā - - - - - - sanme ni qme nu kvan paṅket bhakti ta vraḥ kaṁ[steṅ]
vraḥ _ _ _ ta (da _ hadarana) na phoṅṅ dau $circleSmall gi [ka]nloṅ kaṃsteṅ [Añ] - - -
sre ta vraḥ [kaṃsteṅ Añ] ta [jmaḥ steṅṅ] Appa $circleSmall ta gi nuva Ābharanaṁ phoṅṅ de[ñ] vr—
vraḥ kaṃsteṅ Añ śrī varddhamāneśvara $circleSmall daha vraḥ kaṃsteṅ Añ laḥ [gi hita]
[lāṅ] kaṃsteṅ Añ laḥ [syaṅ] ta grap Ābharaṇa man svāmi paṅket bhakti
nā vraḥ [vleṅ] dai sot ti svāmi ta jmaḥ steñ Appa paṅket bhakti
[gi] ne[ḥ] vrai [gi vrai]----Ukk ($circleSmall) gi bhaktī man svāmī prakop ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ [Añ]
$circleSmall hadya $circleSmall śaṅkha $circleSmall dāsa $circleSmall dāsi $circleSmall tai kr̥s $circleSmall tai thmāy $circleSmall tai s[u]bhadrā $circleSmall tai kaṁpas
$circleSmall gho nāgaṣara $circleSmall gho Āditya $circleSmall gho piṅ[pā]ṅ $circleSmall gho panlas $circleSmall gho Īśvaradā[sa]
gi sruk pr̥ nā svāmī Aṅgvay ti nivedana ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ Añ $circleSmall jā Ā
śrama nu sre $ddanda phle gi sre dai Aṁ[vi ta] gi daṁnap [j]ranyaṅṅ dai dau pūrvva prasa[p]
[d]rākṣa $circleSmall dau paścima prasap vrai jneṅ $circleSmall dau uttara prasap phlu thmur $circleSmall gi
nuva srukka nuva sre [ti] svāmī ta jmaḥ steñ Appa paṁre ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ A-
ñ śrī varddhamāneśvara nitya $circleSmall ($circleSmall)

$circleSmall $circleSmall $circleSmall cloñ hr̥dayabhāva mūla vraḥ kra nu ta bhāryya paṅket bhakti ta
vraḥ kaṁsteṅ Añ śrī varddhamā[neśvara nitya] nu - - - - - - daṁnepra - -[ma]ntriya dau $circleSmall -au
kinnara $circleSmall nu khñuṁ ta tiṅṅ gi[ki]nnara $circleSmall tai pandan $circleSmall -------n gho kanĀt [gho] panlas $circleSmall gho
n ren $circleSmall gho madhuragīta $circleSmall gi sru[ka] - - - - - -jana ti nivedana ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ [Añ]
jā Āśrama $circleSmall nuva sre phle gi $circleSmall gi sre ----[Aṁ]vi ta gi srukka [lvoḥ] ta gi gola $circleSmall gi [phle]
nuva srukka nuva sre ti paṁre ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ Añ śrī varddha[mā]neśvaranitya ($circleSmall)
$circleSmall $circleSmall $circleSmall cloñ śikhāśiva paṅket bhakti ta [v]raḥ [kaṁste]ṅ Añ [śrī va]rddhamāneśvara $circleSmall niveda-
na khñuṁ ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ Añ tai ka----------- $circleSmall ka gi ------- $circleSmall ----ki [voca ju[ṁ] ti

$circleSmall $circleSmall $circleSmall -----------------nta[dāntāvācāryya khñuṁ ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ Añ śrī varddha-
mā[neśvara o tai] saṁmr̥[dhī $circleSmall]

Face B
$gomutraInitial steñ(·) --------yasāla $circleSmall ---ra --- paṅket· -----[vraḥ] (kaṁ)steṅ· Añ· (śrī varddha)-
māneśvara $circleSmall nive[dana] khñuṁ ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ· Añ· ------dasi dāsa $circleTarget steñ(·)
{1}(sa)śi[va] nu cloñ· somaśikhā (ta jā) qryāṁ nu (phqvann·) [s]yaṅ ta sanme ni paṅket· [bha]-
ktī ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ· Añ· śrī varddhamāneśvara $circleSmall ni[veda]na ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ· Añ·
gho kanteṅ· $circleSmall tai kaṁvrau $circleSmall kvan· kaṁvrau $circleSmall tai thqyak· $circleSmall {4} (vra){4}
tai thleṁ $circleSmall {3} mvāy(·) {3}nya[n]ya(space of 3 akṣara)ra $circleSmall ... [cloñ so]-
maśikhā(daiva) cloñ· prabhāditya paṅket· bhakti ta vraḥ (kaṁsteṅ· A)ñ· śrī [varddha]-
[mā]neśvara $circleSmall nivedana khñuṁ ta vraḥ kaṁsteṅ· Añ· $dotMid tai dharaṇī $dotMid kvan· dharaṇī $dotMid (gho)
chpoṅ· $circleTarget (tai) panlas(·) $circleSmall [kvan·] (panla)s· tai kañjes· $circleSmall tai devikā $circleSmall kvan· de-
vikā $circleSmall (gho) khñuṁ vraḥ $circleSmall gho ... [cloñ· somaśikhā]
duñ· $circleSmall ... nivedana khñuṁ ta vraḥ kaṁste-
ṅ· Añ· śrī (varddhamā)neśvara $circleSmall tai (kaṁvai) $circleSmall kvan· kaṁvai vyara $circleSmall {3} syaṅ ta A-
ṅgvay· ta [Āśrama] ta [vraḥ kaṁste]ṅ· Añ(·) $circleSmall ...
cloñ· (jana)... (vraḥ kaṁsteṅ· Añ)· śrī varddhamāneśvara $circleSmall [tai] si[ddhirā]ja $circleSmall
kvan(·) siddhirāja $circleSmall tai ... tai Aṅ· Oṅ· {2} bhaktī cloñ· ($circleTarget)
Edited by Sotheara Vong (122-129) in Roman and Khmer scripts with a Khmer translation; the variants of reading are taken from both the Roman and Khmer scripts.
